title: Molecular Biology (English) Master Program Mission and Vision
content:
Molecular Biology (English) Master Program Mission and Vision

Misyon

The mission of the Department of Molecular Biology of the Üsküdar University Graduate School of Science and Technology is to contribute to the training of competent academics in the field of Molecular Biology; to develop interdisciplinary research in the axis of the field of Molecular Biology.

Vizyon

The vision of the Department of Molecular Biology of the Üsküdar University Graduate School of Science and Technology is to be a program that trains qualified researchers in the national and international arena and contributes to the development of science and Molecular Biology.
